## The first app dedicated to 1980s tape-edit effects.

## The first app dedicated to 1980s tape-edit effects.

56 followers

Visit website

iVox brings the lost art of tape multi-editing to your own computer. Inspired by the legendary editing style of The Latin Rascals, Omar Santana, and Chep Nunez — the pioneers who defined 80s freestyle, hip-hop, and the megamix era.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Team
 More

Subscribe

# iVoxAlternatives

Love iVox’s 1980s tape‑edit vibe? Try Logic Pro X for deep multitrack editing, Loopback for cable‑free routing, Libretto for fast, unlimited edits, DJay 2 for live chops, and ACE Studio 2.0 for AI-powered workflows.

  ### Antika Cam - VHS Camcorder

  Vintage 90's Video Effects [...] # VHS Cam: Vintage Video Editor

Retro camera 90s filters

Free · Designed for iPad. Not verified for macOS.

 155 Ratings
 Age Rating

  4+
 

  Photo & Video
 Dmitriy Yudin
 Language

  EN

  English
 Size

  293.3

  MB

 
 
 
 
 
 

A VHS effect is a textured, distorted effect that mimics an old analog video recording on tape cassette. Creating this vintage effect brings a nice old-school discord to an edit. This super easy-to-use app is filled with effects and glitches perfect for creating a nostalgic feeling. Simply edit your titles and text and add music. This is a quick, easy, retro template for you to run with! Have fun
